_comment: 24/7 price alerts checked by GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/price-alerts.yml). Edit this file, commit, done. symbol = Binance ticker (BTC, ETH, SOL...). cond = price_above | price_below | change_above | change_below (24h %). Baseline: SOL was $76.04 on 2026-07-13 when these +/- $6 alerts were set.
